headline: Global centres in India slow hiring as AI reshapes work, ANSR CEO says
summary: Global capability centres in India are being measured while hiring as companies are wary ‌about the impact of geopolitical uncertainties and growing AI adoption, the ‌CEO of ANSR, which helps firms build and run global centres, said on Monday.  India is home ​to more than half of the world's global centres as companies prefer its large skilled workforce, lower operating costs and rising ability to support high-value jobs across technology, finance and engineering.  However, the rise of artificial intelligence could test that edge by ‌reducing headcounts for some roles ⁠and reshaping the kind of work global centres do.

content.title: Global centres in India slow hiring as AI reshapes work, ANSR CEO says
content.summary: Global capability centres in India are being measured while hiring as companies are wary ‌about the impact of geopolitical uncertainties and growing AI adoption, the ‌CEO of ANSR, which helps firms build and run global centres, said on Monday.  India is home ​to more than half of the world's global centres as companies prefer its large skilled workforce, lower operating costs and rising ability to support high-value jobs across technology, finance and engineering.  However, the rise of artificial intelligence could test that edge by ‌reducing headcounts for some roles ⁠and reshaping the kind of work global centres do.

headline: LOWE'S BRINGS MRBEAST EXPERIENCE INTO STORES WITH NEW KIDS CLUB WORKSHOPS
summary: As families head into summer and look for ways to keep kids engaged beyond screens with easy, local activities, Lowe's is launching a new exclusive series of MyLowe's Rewards Kids Club workshops and buildable toy kits in collaboration with the most-followed digital creator in the world and member of the Lowe's Creator Network, MrBeast.

content.title: LOWE'S BRINGS MRBEAST EXPERIENCE INTO STORES WITH NEW KIDS CLUB WORKSHOPS
content.summary: As families head into summer and look for ways to keep kids engaged beyond screens with easy, local activities, Lowe's is launching a new exclusive series of MyLowe's Rewards Kids Club workshops and buildable toy kits in collaboration with the most-followed digital creator in the world and member of the Lowe's Creator Network, MrBeast.

thumbnail.caption: Each month, a new collectible kit will be available priced at $14.98 plus tax, which also includes exclusive MrBeast Swarms that kids can only collect from Lowe’s, like the new Swarm Launcher, Swarm Spinner and Swarm Jet, giving families an activity, a take-home toy and a rare MrBeast collectible.

headline: Stocks Set to Open Lower as Oil Rises Amid Iran Impasse, Nvidia Earnings and Fed Minutes Awaited
